analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet reports WHO statistics on COVID-19 vaccine candidates, noting six in phase-3, including three from China. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) — Not present; no critique of the West. CH2 (China as benevolent power) — Not present; no framing of China's cooperative or multilateral virtues, just a factual mention. CH3 (epic history) — Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) — Not addressed. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) — Partially relevant? The tweet notes Chinese candidates reaching phase-3, which could imply technological/biomedical progress, but it does not attribute success to the CCP, celebrate leadership, or claim superiority; it's neutral reporting. Insufficient to qualify. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) — Not relevant. Conclusion: No listed strategic narratives are explicitly promoted.
